title: Robbyant/lingbot-map
friendlyTitle: LingBot-Map turns video streams into 3D scene maps
summary: LingBot-Map is a feed-forward 3D foundation model for streaming scene reconstruction from long image or video sequences, using a geometric context transformer and efficient cached inference.
friendlySummary: This repo helps reconstruct 3D spaces from long videos or image streams.
whyItMatters: Researchers and robotics developers can use it to experiment with 3D reconstruction from streaming visual data, including long indoor, outdoor, aerial, and driving sequences.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful for robotics, mapping, and research projects that need machines to understand physical spaces.
